narrative:
Spencerville Local Sd (Allen) school district has 3,280 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.9% D−R vs -44.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
